body.title: Implement NodeExecutor
body.result: node_executor.py: execute_node(memory, fired_trigger, basket) → ExecutionResult. Full EMITIF/BRANCHIF/FORKIF/ENDIF instruction set. Condition eval via eval_gate. Value resolution (constant/basket/payload). Data guard via triggers dict. MAX_INSTRUCTIONS=200 guard. Smoke tested. 555 tests passing.
body.description: Walks a payload cell instruction list given a basket. Instructions: EMITIF [condition, value, channel], BRANCHIF [condition, target_node_id], END. Condition eval against basket/payload. Dispatches to ChannelRegistry. ~150 lines. Depends on T-channel-registry.
